title: 2026 Oscar Predictions in Every Category - Best Supporting Actress
text: IndieWire's 2026 Oscar predictions cover the Best Supporting Actress category with expert analysis. The race features great established actresses, breakthrough roles, and first-time nominees. Awards Editor Marcus Jones notes this category is one of the hardest to predict. Wunmi Mosaku earned momentum from winning at the BAFTA Awards. Teyana Taylor captured the Golden Globe but momentum seemed to have petered out since then. Amy Madigan holds recognition from the Critics Choice Award and Actor Award but faces a disadvantage as Weapons received minimal additional nominations. Mosaku's broader exposure through Sinners' extensive nomination slate appears to give her the advantage heading into the ceremony. The 98th Academy Awards air March 15, 2026 on ABC with Conan O'Brien returning as host.
